[Question]
What could be the possible causes of toothache?

Toothache can be caused by several issues, including cavities, gum disease, a cracked tooth, an exposed tooth root, or a sinus condition. Other possible causes include tooth grinding, a jaw joint disorder, or an impacted wisdom tooth. In some cases, toothaches can also be a result of non-dental issues like a heart attack or angina, though these are less common. If a toothache is severe or persists, it is important to consult a dentist to determine the exact cause and receive appropriate treatment.
